contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 10
- Description: @⁨Kaon⁩ when designing the experience module editor keep in mind Polyani’s and Moravec’s paradox 
  
  Don’t try to force the AI to do everything 
  
  Leave room for the experience designer to manually inject their secret sauce that even they themselves might find hard to articulate in explicit rules that AIs will understand
  
  Otherwise it’s going to end up being a very frustrating experience
  
  Also try to have 3-4 experience designers utilize your interface to create an experience and then have them use their outputs to really run an experience 
  
  It will yield alot of insights as to what breaks
  
  The by-product is that you will probably end up spending alot of time doing face to face sessions with humans as opposed to sitting behind a computer getting the AI to do stuff for you
  
  Counter-intuitively where you end up spending less time with the LLM and more time with humans understanding their needs is when you are actually going down the right path 😊🙏
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 16.67
- Attached Filename: IMG_2138.png
- Destination Contribution File Location: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/.github/tree/main/assets/contribution_20260602154458_gary_teh_img_2138.png
